summary:
Multiple authoritative sources recommend adjuvant radiotherapy for stage III thymoma due to improved relapse-free and overall survival, particularly in cases with positive margins or lymph node involvement. This supports the need for adjuvant radiation as part of standardized care for high-risk disease.  
\boxed{A}
